summary: iter196 FRONTEND-ONLY retest complete. All Floor + Route surfaces and Activity Timeline WhatsNewPanel verified working correctly. 100% frontend pass rate.
critical_code_review_comments: Floor surface (/floor/:token) renders correctly with station-name, online-indicator, and 3 tabs (queue, ccp, activity)
Floor queue tab shows production runs and packs with action buttons (start, seal, label, issue) with correct testids
Floor CCP tab form works correctly - passing value (78.5) shows '✓ Passing · logged', failing value (65) shows '⚠ OUT OF SPEC · logged'
Floor activity tab shows 'MY LAST 40 ACTIONS' with logged CCP events
Floor invalid token correctly shows error screen with 'Invalid or revoked station link.'
Route surface (/route/:token) renders correctly with driver-name, online-indicator, and 2 tabs (stop, summary)
Route current-stop card shows stop number, temp buttons (2°C, 3°C, 4°C, 5°C), POD buttons (delivered, missed), and prev/next navigation
Route shift-summary tab shows delivered count, issues count, and avg drop temp
Route invalid token correctly shows error screen with 'Invalid or revoked driver link.'
Activity Timeline WhatsNewPanel renders with whats-new-window select (15/30/60/180 min options) and whats-new-run button
Echo 'What just happened?' returns comprehensive NL summary with headline pill when events exist
LLM integration (Claude Sonnet 4.5 via Emergent LLM key) working - returned 64 events summary with mode: llm
